badge_full_footer: Result of co-construction between the author and artificial intelligence
bloc_signature:
Declaration: [TCP/UP: ACE] (AI-Centric Editing)
> Substance: hybrid | Form: hybrid
> Result of co-construction between the author and artificial intelligence
sidebar_download_call: Need a Black & White variant or specific format?
sidebar_disclaimer: TCP/UP is a declarative protocol. The displayed label corresponds to the author's self-declaration about their creation process
philosophy_quote: "It's teamwork. AI proposes a base, the human brings verification, expertise, and the finishing touch."
definition_text: This content is the result of co-construction between humans and AI. AI contributed to the substance of the content (for example in the plan, structure, certain ideas, or text direction) alongside the author.
usecase_text: Documentary research, knowledge base creation, assisted brainstorming, co-authoring, practical guides, technical documentation, tutorials, etc.
example1_text: Ask AI to list the 10 places to visit in Rome, then completely rewrite the descriptions adding your own anecdotes and photos.
example2_text: Ask AI to write an article on 'How to Choose an Electric Bike', then correct technical errors and add your actual product testing.
example3_text: Ask AI to generate a business plan structure, then fill in and modify each section with your figures and strategy.
edgecase1_title: "I generated a plan with AI, then wrote each section entirely myself. ACE or HCE?"
edgecase1_text: ACE. The plan is part of the substance. Even if the writing is 100% human, AI structured your thinking. Transparency demands recognizing this contribution.
edgecase2_title: "I co-wrote with AI, but I feel like I did 80% of the work. Can I use HCE?"
edgecase2_text: Proportion is not the only criterion. If AI brought ideas, angles, or structure you didn't initially have, ACE is more faithful. When in doubt, favor ACE (principle of caution).
edgecase3_title: "AI generated a draft, I completely rewrote it my own way. What label?"
edgecase3_text: ACE. The 'blank page' was provided by AI. Your rewriting work is substantial, but the initial spark and first structure are algorithmic. Moving back to HCE is generally not transparent.
edgecases_more_info: More details on critical cases and arbitration here
prompt1_text: "Generate a first 800-word draft about the benefits of remote work for small businesses. I'll handle proofreading and adding my own case studies."
prompt2_text: "Propose me a detailed outline and introduction for a technical guide on installing solar panels."
prompt3_text: "Propose three different angles for treating the topic 'The impact of AI on education'. I'll choose the one that seems most relevant and develop it."
prompt4_text: "Generate a draft product sheet for a high-end headset. I'll add precise technical specifications and my personal opinion after testing."
